title: Crispy Chickpea French Tart
description: A twist on the classic French tart, this recipe combines crispy chickpeas with a crumble topping for a delightful texture and flavor.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Spread the chickpeas evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chickpeas.
Sprinkle the crumble over the chickpeas.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the pastry with a little water and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
